[cron:4cdc4c97-5c0c-4f19-9e71-9940658658f5 TODO Daily Report] Please disregard the descriptions below that refer to channels other than kimi-claw, as they may be outdated. Additionally, during the next run, please ensure that the message is corrected to be delivered to the kimi-claw channel.

【定时任务】每日 TODO 汇报 - 请读取 task-state.json 和 TODO.md，汇报当前任务进度给用户
Current time: Monday, March 16th, 2026 — 9:00 AM (Asia/Shanghai)

Return your summary as plain text; it will be delivered automatically. If the task explicitly calls for messaging a specific external recipient, note who/where it should go instead of sending it yourself.
